== Notes for [[Item:Q89358|Q89358]] ==

http://webcache.googleusercontent.com/search?q=cache:Xhe6SYyWtvMJ:celeste.kicks-ass.org/~michaelrichards/Web%2520Pages/CD/GC%2520Site/INDIs/II29002.html+%22aurelia+jovina%22&cd=1&hl=no&ct=clnk&gl=no&source=www.google.no

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2DEBAD521D1EFBBE49822EF79916C641F
geni:6000000003828396277

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
